---
title: "Mary Frances Dundas"
---

## Mary Frances Dundas

**Dates:** (1845-1916)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society, niece of Anne Mackenzie

### Biography

Daughter of George Dundas (1802-1869), from 1868 styled Lord Manour, Senator of the College of Justice in Scotland, and his wife Elizabeth Mackenzie (d. 1858), elder sister of Anne Mackenzie.  A Gosling as ‘Ladyfern\' between 1863-before 1869, she was responsible for binding the <i>Barnacle</i>, and CMY thought her careless about it.  [LG 2001; LG 1906 Mackenzie;  Grant, Faculty of Advocates ]

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 11th [1869 [[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from Ash Wednesday [6 March 1867?]
- Letter from [12 January 1866]
- Letter from Novr 22d 1864
- Letter from July 27th [1863]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
